parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the phaser. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls how much of the processed signal feeds back into the input, changing the shape of the phaser's filters.
parameters-en.Mode: Selects the phaser mode. "Up" has an upward phaser sweep, "Down" has a downward phaser sweep, and "Stereo" runs both Up and Down simultaneously, one in each channel.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. For most phasers, you want to keep Mix set to 100%.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
